mnemonics.title: Cloud Service Models
mnemonics.content: IaaS (Infrastructure), PaaS (Platform), SaaS (Software) - Remember 'IPS' for the stack layers

mnemonics.title: Data Lake vs Warehouse
mnemonics.content: LAKE: Large, Any format, Keep Everything | WAREHOUSE: Structured, Analyzed, Relational, Engineered

mnemonics.title: CAP Theorem
mnemonics.content: CAP: Choose 2 - Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance

mnemonics.title: Cloud Cost Factors
mnemonics.content: CENTS: Compute, Egress, Network, Storage, Services

acronyms.usage: Key characteristics of cloud data platforms

visualTips.visualization: Imagine an elastic band expanding/contracting based on workload demands
Picture multiple copies of data spreading across different geographic regions
Visualize developers writing code that automatically scales on invisible infrastructure

analogies.analogy: Like wardrobe organization - daily clothes (hot), seasonal (cool), heirlooms (cold)
Air traffic control system managing data flows between services
Secure private booth in a shared coworking space
